subcodes.title: Words to the Persian friends, spoken on 1912-04-01
subcodes.first_line: The Blessed Perfection has extirpated superstitions, root and branch. The Hands of the Cause in this dispensation are not heirs to any name or title; rather, they are sanctified souls
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمال مبارک ریشهٴ اوهام را کسند ایادی امر در اینظهور باسم و لقب و ارث نیستند
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @priestcraft, @Hands of the Cause, @humility; meekness; lowliness
